SHEET A-00 / PROFILE

Thirty-five years of drawings, from pencil to point cloud.

A career that began with manual drafting boards in 1990s Cairo and now runs full BIM coordination for infrastructure spanning three continents.

HANAN WASFI YOUSSEF
ARCHITECT · CAIRO, EGYPT

Hanan holds a Bachelor of Science in Architectural Engineering from Ain Shams University (1990), graduating with a design for an Olympic Village indoor swimming complex. Since 2010 she has served as BIM Revit Specialist Architect and Lead Design Engineer at Consolidated Contractors Group (CCC), one of the Middle East's largest contractors, where she authors, coordinates, and quality-checks BIM models for airports, ports, stadiums, palaces, metros, and mixed-use developments across Egypt, the Gulf, North Africa, and Central Asia.

Her practice spans the full BIM lifecycle: 4D construction sequencing, 5D quantity take-off, clash coordination, shop-drawing production, BIM Execution Plans, and QA/QC against IFC drawings — most recently deepened by a Master's degree in Global BIM Management from the Universitat de Barcelona and certification as an ISO 19650 Information Manager.

She is currently focused on remote, location-independent BIM consulting — bringing three decades of shop-drawing discipline to teams anywhere in the world.

SHEET A-01 / EXPERTISE

What the models get checked against.

Working methods refined across dozens of live construction sites — from first authoring pass to final as-built QA/QC.

4D Simulation

Construction sequencing and schedule visualization using Solibri and Navisworks Manage.

5D Quantification

BOQ verification and MTO/QTO production using Navisworks, Revit, and Visicon.

Clash Coordination

Identifying and resolving multi-discipline clashes across Navisworks, Revit & Solibri.

Shop Drawings

Architectural & structural shop drawings in Revit, ArchiCAD, and AutoCAD.

BIM Authoring

3D model design, families, libraries and templates, and full sheet production.

RFI & Issue Management

Site-conflict resolution and RFIs via BIM360 and Autodesk Docs.

BIM Execution Plans

Standards, workflows, and BEPs across disciplines and project phases.

QA / QC

Systematic model-versus-IFC drawing comparison, with model updates in turn.

Walkthroughs & Rendering

Client-facing 3D walkthroughs and animation using Revit and D5 Render.

RevitNavisworks ManageSolibri Synchro (Bentley)ArchiCADAutoCAD VisiconBIM 360Autodesk Docs D5 RenderPhotoshop

SHEET A-04 / CAREER RECORD

From drafting table to digital twin.

Fifteen years at Consolidated Contractors Group, built on a decade of prior practice across independent studios in Cairo, Saudi Arabia, and Germany.

2010 — PRESENT

Consolidated Contractors Group (CCC)

BIM Revit Specialist Architect, Lead Design Engineer · Cairo, Egypt

Full BIM lifecycle ownership: authoring, 4D/5D simulation, clash coordination, shop drawings, BEPs, RFIs, and QA/QC across airport, port, metro, palace, and mixed-use projects in Egypt, the Gulf, North Africa and Central Asia.

2001 — 2010

Al Fouzan Office

Remote design role · Al Khobar, Saudi Arabia

Tender drawings and plan presentations for luxury villas; 3D modeling of residential villas and compounds.

2000 — 2002

Euro Egyptian Engineering (EEE) S.A.E.

Cairo, Egypt & Stuttgart, Germany

Working drawings for luxury villas in Katameya, a multipurpose building in Stuttgart, and 3D modeling for factories in Badr City.

1990 — 2000

Formative Practice

Cairo & Saudi Arabia — nine studios, ten years

Manual and early-CAD drafting across residential, religious, hospitality and furniture projects, building the discipline that underlies today's BIM practice.
